category_sources: source_facts.description says mkcue generates a CUE sheet from a CD; Debian package metadata classifies it in sound and repeats that purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mkcue; Debian package/source pages use package name mkcue.
docs_sources: Debian manpage documents mkcue syntax and options; source_facts.homepage points to the official Debian package page and no upstream documentation site was present in the input.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is a Debian package page and the Debian VCS/source pages are packaging/source distribution surfaces, not an upstream official project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; Debian package/manpage describes generating CUE sheets from CD devices.
